name: Black and White Chocolate Streusel Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsweetened Cocoa Powder, firmly packed
12 oz White Chocolate, Imported, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Generously grease a 9 x 13-inch baking pan. Dust with flour; tap out excess.
2. In a large bowl, beat together butter and granulated sugar with an electric mixer on medium until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add cocoa and beat until well mixed. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir together flour, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl. Add to chocolate mixture alternately with sour cream. In another small bowl, mix together brown sugar, pecans, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. Turn half of the batter into prepared pan and spread evenly. Sprinkle half of white chocolate chunks and half of the brown sugar-nut mixture evenly over batter. Repeat layers with remaining batter, remaining white chocolate chunks, and remaining brown sugar-nut mixture.
5. Bake 35 to 45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cut into squares, and serve warm or at room temperature.
